narrative:
Sagamore Hills Twp D (precinct in Summit County) has 867 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a clear Republican lean of 10.5 percentage points.
